<!-- Code generated by cmd/docgen ("go generate ./..."); DO NOT EDIT. -->
<!-- Regenerate with `make cli-docs` after changing flags in pkg/sabliercmd. -->

Every option can be set three ways, in increasing precedence: **configuration file -> environment variable -> command-line flag**. See [Configuration](/configuration/) for the file search order and precedence rules. Each option below shows all three forms; pick a tab and it stays selected across the page.

## Value types

The **Type** of each option below links here.

### string

Any text value.

### integer

A whole number.

### number

A decimal number.

### boolean

`true` or `false`.

### duration

A Go duration string, e.g. `5m`, `1m30s`, `20s`, `500ms`.

## `sablier health`

Calls the health endpoint of a Sablier instance

### `--url`

Sablier health endpoint

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `http://localhost:10000/health`

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
url: http://localhost:10000/health
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_URL=http://localhost:10000/health
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--url=http://localhost:10000/health
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

## `sablier start`

Start the Sablier server

### `--provider.auto-stop-externally-started`

Continuously stop instances with sablier.enable=true that are running but were not started by Sablier

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  auto-stop-externally-started: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_AUTO_STOP_EXTERNALLY_STARTED=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.auto-stop-externally-started=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.auto-stop-on-startup`

Stop all sablier.enable=true instances running at startup that were not started by Sablier

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `true` &middot; **Since:** [v1.8.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.8.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  auto-stop-on-startup: true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_AUTO_STOP_ON_STARTUP=true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.auto-stop-on-startup=true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.auto-warm-externally-started`

Continuously create a default-duration session for instances with sablier.enable=true that are running but were not started by Sablier, instead of stopping them

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** unreleased

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  auto-warm-externally-started: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_AUTO_WARM_EXTERNALLY_STARTED=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.auto-warm-externally-started=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.docker.honor-restart-policy`

Honor the container restart policy on successful exit: report "no"/"on-failure" containers as completed and exited "always"/"unless-stopped" containers as stopped. Deprecated: will become the default in v2.

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** unreleased

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  docker:
    honor-restart-policy: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_DOCKER_HONOR_RESTART_POLICY=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.docker.honor-restart-policy=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.docker.strategy`

Strategy to use to stop docker containers (stop or pause)

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `stop` &middot; **Since:** [v1.11.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.11.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  docker:
    strategy: stop
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_DOCKER_STRATEGY=stop
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.docker.strategy=stop
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.kubernetes.burst`

Maximum burst for K8S API access client-side throttling

**Type:** [integer](#integer) &middot; **Default:** `10` &middot; **Since:** [v1.4.1-beta.2](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.4.1-beta.2)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  kubernetes:
    burst: 10
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_KUBERNETES_BURST=10
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.kubernetes.burst=10
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.kubernetes.delimiter`

Delimiter used for namespace/resource type/name resolution. Defaults to "_" for backward compatibility. But you should use "/" or "."

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `_` &middot; **Since:** [v1.7.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.7.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  kubernetes:
    delimiter: _
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_KUBERNETES_DELIMITER=_
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.kubernetes.delimiter=_
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.kubernetes.qps`

QPS limit for K8S API access client-side throttling

**Type:** [number](#number) &middot; **Default:** `5` &middot; **Since:** [v1.4.1-beta.2](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.4.1-beta.2)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  kubernetes:
    qps: 5
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_KUBERNETES_QPS=5
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.kubernetes.qps=5
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.name`

Provider to use to manage containers [docker docker_swarm swarm kubernetes podman proxmox_lxc]

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `docker` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  name: docker
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_NAME=docker
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.name=docker
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.podman.uri`

Uri is the URI to connect to the Podman service.

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `unix:///run/podman/podman.sock` &middot; **Since:** [v1.10.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.10.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  podman:
    uri: unix:///run/podman/podman.sock
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_PODMAN_URI=unix:///run/podman/podman.sock
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.podman.uri=unix:///run/podman/podman.sock
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.proxmox-lxc.tls-insecure`

Skip TLS certificate verification for Proxmox VE API

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.12.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  proxmox-lxc:
    tls-insecure: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_PROXMOX_LXC_TLS_INSECURE=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.proxmox-lxc.tls-insecure=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.proxmox-lxc.token-id`

Proxmox VE API token ID (e.g. root@pam!sablier)

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.12.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  proxmox-lxc:
    token-id: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_PROXMOX_LXC_TOKEN_ID=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.proxmox-lxc.token-id=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.proxmox-lxc.token-secret`

Proxmox VE API token secret

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.12.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  proxmox-lxc:
    token-secret: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_PROXMOX_LXC_TOKEN_SECRET=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.proxmox-lxc.token-secret=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.proxmox-lxc.url`

Proxmox VE API URL (e.g. https://proxmox:8006/api2/json)

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.12.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  proxmox-lxc:
    url: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_PROXMOX_LXC_URL=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.proxmox-lxc.url=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.reject-unlabeled-requests`

Reject direct named requests for instances without sablier.enable=true

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  reject-unlabeled-requests: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_REJECT_UNLABELED_REQUESTS=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.reject-unlabeled-requests=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--provider.verify-enabled-on-expiration`

Verify sablier.enable=true before stopping expired instances

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
provider:
  verify-enabled-on-expiration: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_PROVIDER_VERIFY_ENABLED_ON_EXPIRATION=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--provider.verify-enabled-on-expiration=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--server.base-path`

The base path for the API

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `/` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
server:
  base-path: /
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_SERVER_BASE_PATH=/
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--server.base-path=/
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--server.metrics.enabled`

Enable the Prometheus /metrics endpoint

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.12.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.12.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
server:
  metrics:
    enabled: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_SERVER_METRICS_ENABLED=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--server.metrics.enabled=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--server.port`

The server port to use

**Type:** [integer](#integer) &middot; **Default:** `10000` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
server:
  port: 10000
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_SERVER_PORT=10000
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--server.port=10000
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--sessions.default-duration`

The default session duration

**Type:** [duration](#duration) &middot; **Default:** `5m0s` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
sessions:
  default-duration: 5m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_SESSIONS_DEFAULT_DURATION=5m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--sessions.default-duration=5m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--sessions.expiration-interval`

The expiration checking interval. Higher duration gives less stress on CPU. If you only use sessions of 1h, setting this to 5m is a good trade-off.

**Type:** [duration](#duration) &middot; **Default:** `20s` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
sessions:
  expiration-interval: 20s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_SESSIONS_EXPIRATION_INTERVAL=20s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--sessions.expiration-interval=20s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--storage.file`

File path to save the state

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
storage:
  file: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STORAGE_FILE=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--storage.file=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.blocking.default-refresh-frequency`

Default refresh frequency at which the instances status are checked for blocking strategy

**Type:** [duration](#duration) &middot; **Default:** `5s` &middot; **Since:** [v1.9.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.9.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  blocking:
    default-refresh-frequency: 5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_BLOCKING_DEFAULT_REFRESH_FREQUENCY=5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.blocking.default-refresh-frequency=5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.blocking.default-timeout`

Default timeout used for blocking strategy

**Type:** [duration](#duration) &middot; **Default:** `1m0s` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  blocking:
    default-timeout: 1m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_BLOCKING_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT=1m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.blocking.default-timeout=1m0s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.dynamic.custom-themes-path`

Custom themes folder, will load all .html files recursively

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  dynamic:
    custom-themes-path: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_DYNAMIC_CUSTOM_THEMES_PATH=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.dynamic.custom-themes-path=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.dynamic.default-refresh-frequency`

Default refresh frequency in the HTML page for dynamic strategy

**Type:** [duration](#duration) &middot; **Default:** `5s` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  dynamic:
    default-refresh-frequency: 5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_DYNAMIC_DEFAULT_REFRESH_FREQUENCY=5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.dynamic.default-refresh-frequency=5s
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.dynamic.default-theme`

Default theme used for dynamic strategy

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `hacker-terminal` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  dynamic:
    default-theme: hacker-terminal
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_DYNAMIC_DEFAULT_THEME=hacker-terminal
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.dynamic.default-theme=hacker-terminal
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--strategy.dynamic.show-details-by-default`

Show the loading instances details by default

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `true` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
strategy:
  dynamic:
    show-details-by-default: true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_STRATEGY_DYNAMIC_SHOW_DETAILS_BY_DEFAULT=true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--strategy.dynamic.show-details-by-default=true
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--tracing.enabled`

Enable OpenTelemetry distributed tracing

**Type:** [boolean](#boolean) &middot; **Default:** `false` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
tracing:
  enabled: false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_TRACING_ENABLED=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--tracing.enabled=false
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--tracing.endpoint`

OTLP collector base URL (used when tracing.exporter-type=otlphttp)

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `http://localhost:4318` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
tracing:
  endpoint: http://localhost:4318
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_TRACING_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:4318
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--tracing.endpoint=http://localhost:4318
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--tracing.exporter-type`

Trace exporter backend: otlphttp or stdout

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `otlphttp` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
tracing:
  exporter-type: otlphttp
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_TRACING_EXPORTER_TYPE=otlphttp
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--tracing.exporter-type=otlphttp
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--tracing.sampling-rate`

Fraction of traces to sample (0.0–1.0)

**Type:** [number](#number) &middot; **Default:** `1` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
tracing:
  sampling-rate: 1
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_TRACING_SAMPLING_RATE=1
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--tracing.sampling-rate=1
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--tracing.service-name`

Service name reported to the tracing backend

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `sablier` &middot; **Since:** [v1.13.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.13.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
tracing:
  service-name: sablier
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_TRACING_SERVICE_NAME=sablier
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--tracing.service-name=sablier
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

## `sablier version`

Print the version Sablier

_This command takes no flags of its own._

## Global flags

Available on every command.

### `--configFile`

Config file path. If not defined, looks for sablier.(yml|yaml|toml) in /etc/sablier/ > $XDG_CONFIG_HOME > $HOME/.config/ and current directory

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Since:** [v1.1.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.1.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
configFile: ""
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_CONFIGFILE=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--configFile=
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}

### `--logging.level`

The logging level. Can be one of [error, warn, info, debug]

**Type:** [string](#string) &middot; **Default:** `info` &middot; **Since:** [v1.0.0](https://github.com/sablierapp/sablier/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

{{< tabs >}}
{{< tab name="Config file" >}}

```yaml
logging:
  level: info
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Environment variable" >}}

```bash
SABLIER_LOGGING_LEVEL=info
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< tab name="Command-line flag" >}}

```bash
--logging.level=info
```

{{< /tab >}}
{{< /tabs >}}
